seo.title: Book a Free Assessment | Cedar Tutoring Academy
seo.description: Book a free assessment with Cedar Tutoring Academy to discuss your child's goals, get a tutoring recommendation, and hear back within 24 hours for next steps.

hero.eyebrow: Free assessment • No obligation • Personalized plan
hero.heading: Book your free learning assessment.
hero.subtitle: Tell us a little about your child and we'll guide you through a simple, no-pressure next step: a free 30-minute assessment, a scheduling call, and a personalized learning plan built around real needs.

heroImage.alt: Illustration of a Cedar learning assessment with a clipboard, calendar, and progress chart

formIntro.heading: Tell us about your child.
formIntro.subtitle: This quick form helps us recommend the right program, campus, and next step before we call to schedule.
formIntro.reassurance: Prefer to talk first? Call Cedar and we'll help you choose the best fit.

stepsSection.heading: A simple, supportive process from first form to first plan.
stepsSection.subtitle: Every assessment is designed to reduce stress, answer questions clearly, and help families make a confident decision.

items.title: 1. Fill out the form
items.description: Share your child's grade level, goals, and the subjects you want support with so we can prepare before we call.

items.title: 2. We call to schedule
items.description: A Cedar team member reaches out within 24 hours to confirm details, answer questions, and find a convenient time.

items.title: 3. Free 30-minute assessment
items.description: We meet with your child, identify strengths and learning gaps, and get clear on the support that will help most.

items.title: 4. Custom learning plan
items.description: You'll leave with a personalized recommendation for program mix, location, schedule, and next steps — with no pressure to enroll.

faqSection.heading: Questions parents ask before booking.
faqSection.subtitle: A few quick answers to make the process feel easy and predictable.

items.question: Is the assessment really free?
items.answer: Yes. The initial learning assessment and follow-up recommendation are completely free, with no obligation to enroll afterward.

items.question: How long does the assessment take?
items.answer: Most assessments take about 30 minutes. We'll confirm the exact format and what to expect when we call to schedule.

items.question: What should my child bring?
items.answer: Usually just a positive attitude and, if helpful, a recent assignment, test, or report card. We'll let you know if anything specific would be useful.

items.question: What happens after the assessment?
items.answer: We'll walk you through what we noticed, answer your questions, and recommend the program, schedule, and location that make the most sense for your child.

closing.heading: Let's make the next step feel clear and manageable.
closing.body: Families come to Cedar for more than tutoring. They come for calm communication, honest guidance, and a plan that fits real school life.
highlights: Support for K–12 tutoring and test prep
